title: Video by ft_goalkeeper
description:
Why you should train hand-eye coordination👇

1️⃣ Improved athletic performance - Enhances accuracy, reflexes and reaction time
2️⃣ Improved brain function - Activates neural pathways and enhances cognitive skills
3️⃣ Faster response - Helps you respond more quickly to stimulis in your environment

⚡️Follow @ft_goalkeeper for more training drills
